expected_en_titles: Red Sea Bream and Vegetable Tempura Rice Bowl
notes: Handwritten vertical menu for a weekly limited lunch special. The main item is a 'Red Sea Bream and Vegetable Tempura Rice Bowl' priced at 1,150 yen, served with miso soup and pickles.
A simple printed menu for a Japanese restaurant listing several lunch set options. The text uses wide spacing between characters in some dish names.

A handwritten sign for a 'Tempura Set Meal' (天ぷら定食) displayed outside a restaurant. The menu lists the specific items included in the set: shrimp, hairtail, whiting, scallop, three kinds of vegetables, salad, rice, miso soup, and pickles for 1,500 yen.
Series of handwritten menu slips for individual tempura items pinned to a wall. Each slip contains the item name and its price written vertically.
Handwritten lunch menu with four options. Each item has a base price and a tax-included price listed in parentheses.
